description: This file defines a Java interface for a refresh token repository in a Spring Boot application. It extends JpaRepository and provides a custom method to find refresh tokens by their hash.

classes.name: RefreshTokenRepository
classes.description: A Spring Data JPA repository interface for managing RefreshToken entities, with a custom method to find tokens by token hash.

methods.name: findByTokenHash
methods.description: Finds a RefreshToken by its hash value using a custom query method.
